subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-17 in London
subcodes.first_line: God willing! If I go to America another time I will go differently; but it is very difficult
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @praise of Western values; culture, @review of publications, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
